name: prw
description: Extract, check, update, and relink source-map-grounded academic paper knowledge in an EPI-compatible Obsidian/LLM Wiki.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.5 | Source-map PRW deposition, checks, update, relink, redo.
interface.longDescription: Paper Research Wiki gives users one plugin-level assistant for EPI-collected papers. The default path is to inspect EPI handoffs, identify ready papers, and deposit them into the wiki while keeping detailed provenance, source-map-first reference writing, formula reasoning chains, evidence figure cards, page-family rules, formal-page language style, link repair, linting, taxonomy maintenance, QMD-compatible indexing, and a post-task check inside internal workflows so users do not need to learn many skill names.
defaultPrompt: 提取并直接沉淀 EPI 抓下来的论文到 wiki。
检测论文 wiki 库的状态、缺口、link 混乱和待处理任务。
更新论文 wiki 库，继续沉淀、重link、兼容 QMD，并修复 ready 的论文。
